prompt: Replace the clothes of the woman in the first image with those from the woman in the second image, and change her hairstyle to match the one from the woman in the third image.

Additionally, change her current voluminous afro hairstyle to the sleek, pulled-back low bun hairstyle seen on the woman in image 3.
